templates.name: Mutual NDA
templates.description: Common Paper standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (Standard Terms) for protecting confidential information exchanged between two parties.

templates.name: Mutual NDA - Cover Page
templates.description: Cover Page for the Common Paper Mutual NDA. Capture counterparty details and signatures; incorporates the MNDA Standard Terms by reference.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement (CSA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for early-stage collaboration between a vendor and a design partner customer.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Service Level Agreement, designed to be paired with the Cloud Service Agreement to define uptime and support commitments.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement (PSA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement for engagements involving SOWs and deliverables.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
templates.description: Common Paper Data Processing Agreement for GDPR/CCPA-aligned processing of personal data between controller and processor.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement for licensing on-premises or downloadable software.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement governing reseller, referral, and other commercial partner relationships.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement: a short-term contract for trials/evaluations of a product before a full commercial deal.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement (BAA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement covering HIPAA obligations when handling Protected Health Information.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum: an add-on for existing commercial agreements that addresses AI-specific obligations such as training data, model use, and outputs.
